subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! His Honour Haydar-'Alí-i-Iskaví hath in his letter opened his tongue in intercession and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان جناب حیدر قبل علی اسکوای در نامه خویش بشفاعت زبان گشوده و از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
